code:
import io
import string

let raw = io.read_to_end()
let input = "#{raw} "
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut tok = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  mut b = 32
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    b = x
  when None
    b = 32
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          if string.is_empty(evens)
            evens = "#{v}"
          else
            evens = "#{evens} #{v}"
          end
        else
          if string.is_empty(odds)
            odds = "#{v}"
          else
            odds = "#{odds} #{v}"
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      tok = ""
    end
  else
    tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
